zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Isabelle Vaux於大約1404年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾時，她的父親William Vaux30歲，母親Eleanor Drakelowe31歲。她於1434年與Sir William Tresham在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1478年在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Isabelle Vaux于大约1404年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾时，她的父亲William Vaux30岁，母亲Eleanor Drakelowe31岁。她于1434年与Sir William Tresham在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1478年在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vaux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of various places in northern France called Vaux, from the Old French plural of val ‘valley’. Compare English Vause and French Devaux .

History: Richard Vaux (1749–90) emigrated from Sussex, England, to Philadelphia, PA, in early youth. Calvert Vaux, landscape architect, emigrated from London, England, to America in 1850 and designed several major US parks, including Central Park in New York City (with Frederick Olmstead). — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its variant Veaux and altered form Devoe ) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Vause
meanings: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Vaux (see Vaux ), a common French placename, singular and plural of val ‘valley’, the plural form being Latinized in surnames as de Vallibus. Norman lords with this surname are recorded in 12th- and early 13th-century records in Cumberland (Irthington), Devon (Farwood, in Colyton), East Yorkshire (Warter), Essex (Belchamp), and Leicestershire (Belvoir). Compare Vale .

nickname perhaps from Middle English fals, faus, vaus (Old French fals, faus, Old English fals) ‘deceitful, disloyal, dishonest, mendacious’, but it is more likely the name arises from 1, with the common Anglo-Norman French substitution of le for de in their surname.

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Isabelle Vaux was born about 1404, in Northamptonshire, England, her father, William Vaux, was 30 and her mother, Eleanor Drakelowe, was 31. She married Sir William Tresham in 1434, in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1478, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Isabelle Vaux est née environ 1404, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, William Vaux, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Drakelowe, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Tresham en 1434, à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1478, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Isabelle Vaux um 1404 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Vaux 30 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Drakelowe 31. Sie hat 1434 in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Sir William Tresham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1478 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Isabelle Vaux è nata il circa 1404 nel Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, William Vaux, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Drakelowe, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Tresham nel 1434, nel Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1478, nel Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Isabelle Vauxが約1404年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Vauxは30歳，母Eleanor Drakeloweは31歳であった。1434年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンでSir William Treshamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1478年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Isabelle Vaux(이)가 대략 1404년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Vaux(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Drakelowe(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1434년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에서 Sir William Tresham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1478년 영국 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Isabelle Vaux nasceu aproximadamente 1404, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Vaux, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Drakelowe, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Tresham em 1434, em Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1478, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Isabelle Vaux родилась около 1404 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Vaux было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Drakelowe, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Tresham в 1434 г. в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1478 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Isabelle Vaux nació aproximadamente 1404, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Vaux, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Eleanor Drakelowe, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Sir William Tresham en 1434, en Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1478, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años.
